title: Reflected XSS via URL Path in /archive/ Endpoint - CrowdStream - Bugcrowd
report_body: Reflected XSS via URL Path in /archive/ Endpoint - CrowdStream - Bugcrowd Hacker Login Customer Login CrowdStream Reflected XSS via URL Path in /archive/ Endpoint Reflected XSS via URL Path in /archive/ Endpoint Disclosed by pwntest Engagement National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA) - Vulnerability Disclosure Program Disclosed date 5 Jun 2025 11 months ago Priority P3 Bugcrowd's VRT priority rating Status Resolved This vulnerability has been accepted and fixed Summary by National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA) - Vulnerability Disclosure Program Resolved Summary by pwntest There was a Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability on the following subdomain: seabass.gsfc.nasa.gov Any content appended after /archive/ was reflected back into the page without proper sanitization. For example, visiting a URL like: https://seabass.gsfc.nasa.gov/archive/ would cause the injected HTML to appear on the page, leading to JavaScript execution. However, due to a strict CSP, JavaScript execution was blocked in the browser. This happened because user input was directly reflected into the DOM without proper escaping or encoding on the client side. Activity pwntest All-time points 0 Accuracy 100.0% Current rank N/A Priority percentile
